Incapacitated.title: This character is unable to move, potentially due to an injury.

Collapsed.title: This character has collapsed due to loss of consciousness.

Idle.title: This character has nothing to do.

Injured.title: This character has a wound or injury.

Bleeding.title: This character is bleeding from one or more wounds.

BleedingWound.title: This wound is bleeding. It may eventually stop on its own, but successfully tending to it now will stop it straight away.

Away.title: This character is away from the ship.

MentalBreak.title: This character is currently experiencing a mental break.

Tended.title: Some or all of these injuries have been treated and are healing.
